'''Mooth''' was a trader who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].

He regularly dealt with the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] for their annual trading expedition. He also had masterful salesmanship skill which was displayed when he sold a rock pendant to [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] for his [[Monmon seed]]s, unaware it was actually the missing [[Tooth/Legends|tooth]] of the [[Rock Wizard]]

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Mooth was voiced by [[John Stocker]] in the [[Ewoks: Season One|first season]] of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']].
